description: Create an organized bookmark library for new teacher onboarding in Microsoft Edge. Organize the Favorites Bar with a top-level folder named 'District Resources' containing three sub-folders: 'Math & STEM Tools', 'Literacy & Reading', and 'Reference & Research'. Populate 'Math & STEM Tools' with Khan Academy (https://www.khanacademy.org/math), Desmos Graphing Calculator (https://www.desmos.com/calculator), and PhET Interactive Simulations (https://phet.colorado.edu/). Populate 'Literacy & Reading' with CommonLit (https://www.commonlit.org/), Newsela (https://newsela.com/), and ReadWorks (https://www.readworks.org/). Populate 'Reference & Research' with National Geographic Education (https://education.nationalgeographic.org/), NASA STEM Engagement (https://www.nasa.gov/learning-resources/), and Library of Congress Teachers (https://www.loc.gov/programs/teachers/). Export the bookmarks to /home/ga/Desktop/district_bookmarks.html. Additionally, create a text file at /home/ga/Desktop/bookmark_instructions.txt containing a brief email to teachers that lists the three resource categories and explains how to import the HTML file.
